title: [cross-impl] EDHOC sig len: Schnorr48(48B) in C vs Ed25519(64B) in Rust/Python
description: Zephyr oscore/edhoc uses Schnorr48 (EDHOC_SIG_LEN=48, schnorr48_sign in edhoc_sign) while Rust lichen-oscore/edhoc.rs and Python edhoc.py use full 64B Ed25519. Breaks msg2/msg3 parsing, TH computation, MAC verification, OSCORE export. edhoc.json vectors only match Ed25519 path. See explore analysis. Affects interop. Last commits (8f3440cc8, ab7d8ca0e, 40f1a5205 etc) to oscore.c/edhoc.rs did not align this.
